subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is verily the Sovereign of the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه لمالک الملکوت و سلطان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
